product_brief: Ultra-secure key exchange solution delivering long-term enterprise cybersecurity using evolving quantum networks.
pqc_support: No (Product utilizes Quantum Key Distribution, not Post-Quantum Cryptography algorithms)
pqc_capability_description: Not stated. The document describes a Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) solution ("Ultra-secure key exchange for evolving quantum networks") rather than software implementing post-quantum cryptographic algorithms (e.g., lattice-based cryptography). It mentions "quantum-safe" in the context of QKD integration.
crypto_primitives: Not stated (Document focuses on Quantum Key Distribution and key exchange, not specific classical or PQC primitives like ECDSA or RSA)
key_management_model: Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) integration using trusted certified repeater nodes; supports virtual QKD key-swap; vendor-neutral approach allowing multiple vendors.
architecture_type: Network-based key exchange solution utilizing quantum links over optical fibre and trusted/certified repeater nodes; includes a dashboard for monitoring.
license: Proprietary (Implied by "Download Product Sheet", "Schedule a product introduction", and trademark notices)
primary_platforms: Quantum networks over optical fibre; supports simulation via BasejumpSIM in the cloud.
pqc_roadmap_details: Not stated (Roadmap focuses on upgrading from trusted repeater nodes to zero-trust quantum repeater nodes as they become commercially available)

product_brief: Symmetric key infrastructure solution providing post-quantum security via multimodal key establishment.
pqc_support: Yes (combines symmetric key, classical asymmetric key, and post-quantum cryptography)
pqc_capability_description: Combines symmetric key infrastructure with post-quantum cryptography for end-to-end key generation. Provides resilience even if asymmetric cryptography is broken. Supports forward secrecy and post-compromise security. Designed to evolve with emerging threats and integrate with quantum networks.
crypto_primitives: Not stated (Text mentions "symmetric key", "classical asymmetric key", and "post-quantum cryptography" generically without naming specific algorithms like ECDSA, Ed25519, or Kyber)
key_management_model: Multimodal key establishment protocol combining symmetric key infrastructure with post-quantum cryptography to establish end-to-end symmetric pre-shared keys (PSKs).
architecture_type: Software solution integrating into existing infrastructure; described as a "Symmetric key infrastructure solution" and part of the Basejump platform.
primary_platforms: Not stated (Text mentions integration into "existing infrastructure" and "quantum networks" but does not list specific OS or cloud platforms)
pqc_roadmap_details: Designed to be future-adaptable and evolve in response to emerging threats; can be upgraded to work with quantum key exchange capabilities enabled by quantum networks.
authoritative_source_url: Not stated (Source filenames provided, but no public URL extracted from text)
